summary: A relaxing 3-day getaway in Hong Kong focusing on iconic views, harbor cruises, and mid-range comfort, ideal for a peaceful city break.

morning.name: Arrival and Hotel Check-in
morning.description: Arrive at HKG and take the Airport Express to Kowloon for a smooth transition to your hotel.

afternoon.name: Victoria Peak Tram
afternoon.description: Take the historic funicular railway to Victoria Peak for panoramic views of the city skyline and harbor.

evening.name: Star Ferry and Tsim Sha Tsui Promenade
evening.description: Enjoy a relaxing ferry ride across Victoria Harbour followed by a stroll along the promenade to see the Symphony of Lights.

morning.name: Nan Lian Garden and Chi Lin Nunnery
morning.description: Explore these serene Tang Dynasty-style gardens and wooden temple complex for a quiet morning.

afternoon.name: West Kowloon Cultural District
afternoon.description: Relax at the Art Park or visit the M+ Museum to experience Hong Kong's modern artistic side by the water.

evening.name: Temple Street Night Market
evening.description: A leisurely walk through the market for snacks, local crafts, and a glimpse of traditional street life.

morning.name: Ngong Ping 360 Cable Car
morning.description: A scenic 25-minute cable car ride over Lantau Island providing spectacular mountain and sea views.

afternoon.name: Po Lin Monastery and Big Buddha
afternoon.description: Visit the world-famous Tian Tan Buddha and enjoy a vegetarian lunch at the monastery.

evening.name: Departure
evening.description: Take the S1 bus or taxi back to the airport for your evening flight home.

weather_summary: Expected temperatures between 24°C and 29°C with high humidity and occasional tropical showers typical of late May.
